title: A New Settlement in the North
article_text: My family had the intention to move to a northern settlement. The gap between our old home and the new one was enormous. We wanted to expose ourselves to a rare opportunity for a fresh start. My father was a critic of city life, so he was happy to leave. The minimum we needed was a small house with a sweet garden. After a long struggle, we achieved a victory and found a permanent home. The estate had a dozen trees and was widely known for its beauty. The weather was variable, but we stayed alive and well. We used to argue about everything, but now we resolve our problems quickly. I advise everyone to acknowledge that a simple life can be equally rewarding.

Which word means 'lasting for a long time'?

Which word means 'a person who gives judgments'?

A wide empty space between two houses, showing a big difference.

A small cozy house with a colorful flower garden in front.
A family raising their arms in joy in front of a new house with a 'sold' sign.
A large green area with many tall trees and a big house in the background.
A sunny day turning into a stormy sky, with a person standing safely under a roof.
